hero.title: Intercultural Center for Children, Youth, and Families
hero.description: We foster creativity, communication, and cultural diversity, because every talent deserves to be discovered

whyChoose.title: Why choose
whyChoose.subtitle: Officially recognized support, professional approach, and openness
whyChoose.feature1: We are an open space for people of all generations and cultures
whyChoose.feature2: We are a recognized organization in the field of child and youth support according to § 75 SGB VIII
whyChoose.feature3: We bring people together, unlock talents, and promote personal development
whyChoose.feature4: We strive to help people find their place in a new culture and integrate into society without losing their roots and spiritual heritage

title.before: For over ten years, TALANT E.V has been helping children and adults

hero.subtitle: Our motto "Awaken your talent!" is a call to discover, develop, and share your abilities.

programs.text: We offer a wide range of educational, creative, and social programs for children, teenagers, and families.

cooperation.text: We promote intercultural meetings, exchange, and cooperation between young people from different countries.

project.text: The project supports dialogue and cultural exchange among youth.

1.title: How can I sign up for a course?
1.answer: You can register via the form on our website or by contacting us directly.

2.title: Where do the classes take place?
2.answer: Courses are held both in-person and online, including locations outside of Münster.

3.title: What kind of help can I receive?
3.answer: We provide educational, creative, and social support.

4.title: How does the official document assistance work?
4.answer: We provide consultations and help with the preparation of official paperwork.

cta.title: Want to participate, collaborate, or support us?
cta.subtitle: We are open to new ideas, teams, and creative partners.

hero.subtitle: We actively participate in international partnerships beyond Münster and promote intercultural meetings, exchange, and youth cooperation from different countries through culture, education, art, and sports.
A brief overview of news to give a small insight into what has happened. Short descriptions for context.
In our center, children, teenagers, and families can express themselves, learn something new, and grow in various directions.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Text: The data controller for personal data processing in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is:
privacyPage.s2Text: We process personal data of website users only to the extent necessary to provide a functional website, process inquiries, register for events, maintain a contact database, and other services available on the website.
privacyPage.s3Intro: Depending on how you use the website, we may process the following data:
privacyPage.s3i6: age, city, nomination, work title, and uploaded files — in cases of participation in competitions or special forms
privacyPage.s3i7: technical data including IP address, date and time of request, browser type, and other server log data
privacyPage.s4t1: The website is hosted on Vercel infrastructure.
privacyPage.s4t2: When visiting the website, technical data may be processed that is necessary for the operation and security of the website, for example:
privacyPage.s4legal2: Our legitimate interest: secure, stable, and correct operation of the website
privacyPage.s4t3: Since the provider's infrastructure may involve data processing outside the EU/EEA, data transfer to third countries may only occur where legally required safeguards are in place, such as standard contractual clauses.
privacyPage.s5t1: We use Firebase / Google Firebase, including Cloud Firestore, for data storage and management.
privacyPage.s5i4: related service labels, creation and update dates of records
privacyPage.s5li1: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — where processing is necessary for the performance of a contract or registration
privacyPage.s5li2: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — where processing is necessary for organizing processes, administering inquiries, and maintaining a contact database
privacyPage.s5t3: Where Google/Firebase services involve data transfer outside the EU/EEA, this is carried out in accordance with GDPR requirements and with appropriate safeguards.
privacyPage.s6intro: If you contact us via the contact form, we may process:
privacyPage.s6t1: This data is used to process your request and respond to you.
privacyPage.s6li1: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — where the inquiry relates to a request for a service, participation, or cooperation
privacyPage.s6li2: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — for general communication and processing of inquiries
privacyPage.s7t1: If you leave your contact details via a subscription form or other form of interest, we may save them in our contact database.
privacyPage.s7t3: Such data may be used to contact you, and to inform you about events, projects, and organizational activities.
privacyPage.s7li1: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — where your consent is required
privacyPage.s7li2: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — where processing is justified by our legitimate interest in organizing contact management
privacyPage.s7t4: If newsletters or marketing messages require separate consent under applicable law, they will only be sent after such consent has been obtained.
privacyPage.s8intro: When registering for events, we may process:
privacyPage.s8t1: This data is used for organizing participation, administering the participant list, and communicating with registered persons.
privacyPage.s9Title: 9. Competitions, Special Forms, and File Uploads
privacyPage.s9t1: For specific projects, competitions, or campaigns, the website may feature special forms that may process:
privacyPage.s9t2: This data is used solely for processing the application, conducting the relevant project or competition, and communicating with participants.
privacyPage.s10t1: We may transfer data only to the extent necessary for the operation of the website and associated services, to the following categories of recipients:
privacyPage.s10i4: technical contractors and services ensuring website operation
privacyPage.s10t2: Where such providers process data on our behalf, they are engaged as data processors in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR.
privacyPage.s11Title: 11. Transfer of Data to Third Countries
privacyPage.s11t1: If personal data is processed by service providers outside the European Union or European Economic Area, such transfer takes place only in compliance with GDPR requirements.
privacyPage.s11t2: This may occur, for example, when using international cloud and email services. In such cases, appropriate legal mechanisms are used, such as the European Commission's standard contractual clauses.
privacyPage.s12t1: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the relevant purposes.
privacyPage.s12t2: The following general guidelines typically apply:
privacyPage.s12i1: contact form data — until the inquiry has been processed
privacyPage.s12i2: event registration data — for the period of preparation, conduct, and subsequent administrative processing of the event
privacyPage.s12i3: subscription and contact data — until consent is withdrawn or the need for retention lapses
privacyPage.s12i4: special application data and uploaded files — until the project, competition, or related organizational period is concluded
privacyPage.s12i5: technical logs — a limited period necessary for website security and functioning
privacyPage.s13t1: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies necessary for the proper functioning of the website, ensuring security, saving user preferences, and managing consent for the use of certain categories of cookies.
privacyPage.s13t2: To manage cookies and obtain user consent we use the platform c15t.
privacyPage.s13t3: On the first visit to the website, the user is shown a consent banner, through which they can:
privacyPage.s13ai4: change or revoke previously given consent at any time.
privacyPage.s13t4: We may use the following categories of cookies and similar technologies:
privacyPage.s13bi1text: — used for the proper functioning of the website, ensuring security, saving basic settings, and operating the consent management mechanism. Such cookies do not require separate user consent if they are genuinely necessary for the provision of the requested service.
privacyPage.s13bi2text: — may be used to remember user preferences and improve the convenience of using the website.
privacyPage.s13bi3text: — may be used to analyse traffic, user behaviour on the website, and to improve the structure, content, and functionality of the website.
privacyPage.s13bi4text: — may be used to evaluate the effectiveness of information campaigns, personalise content, or interact with external services if such tools are connected to the website.
privacyPage.s13t5: Analytical, marketing, and other optional cookies are only used after obtaining the corresponding user consent, where required by applicable law.
privacyPage.s13t6: Information about the user's choice may be saved using cookies or similar technologies in order to:
privacyPage.s13ci1: not show the banner again on each visit;
privacyPage.s13ci3: allow subsequent changes to the choice.
privacyPage.s13t7: The user can change their cookie settings at any time through the consent management interface available on the website.
privacyPage.s14t1: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, modification, loss, or destruction.
privacyPage.s14t2: Access to certain administrative data and functions is restricted by internal access controls, including admin session verification for administrative operations.
privacyPage.s15i1: request information about your personal data
privacyPage.s15i5: receive data in a portable format, where applicable
privacyPage.s15i6: object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacyPage.s15i7: withdraw consent for the future, where processing is based on consent
privacyPage.s15t1: To exercise your rights, you can contact us at:
privacyPage.s16t1: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR.
privacyPage.s17t1: Where individual forms or projects are intended for minors, data processing is carried out within the limits permitted by law. Where required, participation and the provision of data must occur with the consent of parents or legal guardians.
privacyPage.s18t1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time where required by changes in legislation, services used, or data processing practices. The current version is always published on this page.

cookiePage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePage.s1Text: This Cookie Policy explains which cookies and similar technologies are used on our website, for what purposes they are used, and how users can manage their settings.
cookiePage.s2Text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They allow recognizing the user's browser, saving certain settings, ensuring the correct functioning of the website, and, in some cases, analyzing website usage.
cookiePage.s3i4: other similar technologies necessary for the website to function.
cookiePage.s4Intro: To manage cookies and obtain user consent, we use the platform c15t.
cookiePage.s4Intro2: When you first visit the website, a consent banner is displayed, through which you can:
cookiePage.s4bi4: change or withdraw your consent at any time.
cookiePage.s4Outro: User consent settings are saved so the website can take the made choice into account on subsequent visits.
cookiePage.s51Text: These cookies are necessary for the correct functioning of the website, ensuring security, basic page functionality, as well as for the consent management mechanism. Without such cookies, the website or some of its functions may not work correctly.
cookiePage.s52Text: These cookies may be used to save user settings, interface preferences, or other parameters that improve the usability of the website.
cookiePage.s53Text: Analytical cookies may be used to analyze website traffic, understand user behavior, assess page performance, and improve the structure, content, and functionality of the website.
cookiePage.s54Text: Marketing cookies may be used to evaluate the effectiveness of information campaigns, personalize content, as well as to interact with external services if such tools are connected to the website.
cookiePage.s6Text1: The use of technically necessary cookies may be carried out on the basis of a legitimate interest in ensuring the stable, secure, and correct operation of the website, as well as in cases where such technologies are necessary for providing the service requested by the user.
cookiePage.s6Text2: Analytical, marketing, and other optional cookies are only used after obtaining user consent, if required by applicable law, including the GDPR and German data protection and cookie legislation.
cookiePage.s7Text: The storage period of cookies depends on their purpose. Some cookies only last for the current session and are deleted after closing the browser. Others may be stored on the user's device for a longer period to save settings, preferences, or record the choice made in the consent banner.
cookiePage.s8Intro: Users can also manage cookies independently through their browser settings, including:
cookiePage.s8Outro: Please note that disabling technically necessary cookies may affect the functionality of the website.
cookiePage.s9Text: If the website uses third-party services, integrations, embedded content, or external tools, they may also use their own cookies or similar technologies. In such cases, data processing may be governed by the privacy policies and cookie policies of the respective service providers.
cookiePage.s10Text: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time due to changes in legislation, technologies used, or website functionality. The current version is always published on this page.
cookiePage.s11Intro: If you have questions related to the use of cookies on our website, you can contact us:
